Interface ITopologicalOperator4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides additional information on non-simple geometries.

[Guid("6ABA2E62-630E-4D93-86CA-3D397C28CF44")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITopologicalOperator4 : ITopologicalOperator3, ITopologicalOperator2, ITopologicalOperator
